# Let's open and read the file
path = "/mnt/data/file-321urakJjv3LyLveagf9Nc-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
text, len(text)[:200]

text = open("/mnt/data/file-321urakJjv3LyLveagf9Nc-text_to_analyse.txt","r",encoding="utf-8").read()
# Find all indices of Arabic guillemets pairs and ascii quotes
indices = []
pos = 0
while True:
    left = text.find('«', pos)
    if left == -1:
        break
    right = text.find('»', left+1)
    indices.append((left, right))
    pos = right+1
indices, len(indices)

# find ascii quotes "
quote_positions = [i for i,c in enumerate(text) if c=='"']
quote_positions, len(quote_positions)

spans = []
# guillemet spans
for left,right in indices:
    content = text[left+1:right]
    # Determine if there is extra whitespace at edges to trim (should not be)
    # Compute start and end precisely
    start = left+1
    end = right-1
    # Trim spaces if at edges
    while start <= end and text[start].isspace():
        start += 1
    while end >= start and text[end].isspace():
        end -= 1
    spans.append((start, end, content.strip()))
# double quote ayah between 166 and 195
dq = quote_positions
# get middle pair 166..195
start_ayah = dq[1]+1
end_ayah = dq[2]-1
ayah_text = text[start_ayah:end_ayah+1]
spans, (start_ayah, end_ayah, ayah_text)

import json
entries = []
# Hadiths from guillemets
for (start,end,content) in spans:
    entries.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": content, "citation_type":"Hadeeth"})
# Ayah
entries.append({"span_start": start_ayah, "span_end": end_ayah, "span_text": ayah_text, "citation_type":"Aya"})
# But we need the order as they appear in text
entries_sorted = sorted(entries, key=lambda e: e["span_start"])
json_output = json.dumps({"citations": entries_sorted}, ensure_ascii=False)
json_output

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":37,"span_end":130,"span_text":"المؤمن الذي يخالط الناس ويصبر على أذاهم، أفضل من المؤمن الذي لا يخالط الناس ولا يصبر على أذاهم","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":167,"span_end":194,"span_text":"وَإِنْ تُطِيعُوهُ تَهْتَدُوا","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":265,"span_end":325,"span_text":"المؤمن القوي خير وأحب إلى الله من المؤمن الضعيف، وفي كلٍّ خير","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":666,"span_end":750,"span_text":"إن الله رفيق يحب الرفق، ويعطي على الرفق ما لا يعطي على العنف، وما لا يعطي على ما سواه","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":815,"span_end":872,"span_text":"إن الرفق لا يكون في شيء إلا زانه، ولا ينزع من شيء إلا شانه","citation_type":"Hadeeth"}]}
